title: Stronk Villager Golems
description: Ever felt like iron golems weren't villager-y enough? This is the resource pack for you!
body:
Have you ever thought to yourself: "Wow, iron golems are so cool! If only they more closely resembled a villager, that would be even better!"

Think no more, because now this is 100% possible with my brand new resourcepack!
(This has definitely totally never been done before!)

Features brand new iron golem textures, damage textures, villager sounds, and PBR shaderpack support!

DISCLAIMER: This resourcepack contains blood, so if you're squeamish, maybe stay away. Or don't. I'm not your dad or anything.
